resources.string: Adds additional logging information for developers to identify app components

"Enabling this setting will log additional layout data, including on-screen text for some UI components.
This can help identify components when creating custom filters.
However, enabling this will also log some user data such as your IP address."
Prevents the server from updating the app layout

"App layout reverts to the layout used when first installed.
Some server-side layouts may not revert.
Changes include: • Components in player flyout menu (or related settings) may not work. • Rolling numbers are not animated. • Library tab is shown. • Music section of video description may not work. • Player flyout menu items cannot be hidden. • Account switch button may not appear on the Library tab."
Enter the flyout menu names to filter by, separated by new lines
Enable Library / You bottom menu filter
Enter the Library / You bottom menu names to filter by, separated by new lines
Hides the album cards under the artist description
Hides the artist card at the top of the search results
Hides compact banners and spacing between some components
Hides floating microphone button in the lower-right corner of search suggestions screen

Hides horizontal shelves such as Breaking news, Community posts you may like, Continue watching, Explore more channels, Explore more topics, For You, Latest videos, Most relevant, Posts from Creator\'s Community, Shopping, and Watch it again
Hides image shelves in search results
Hides the blue \'Latest videos\' banner that appears at the top of the Home feed
Hides the reminder button for scheduled livestreams and premieres
Hides the feature that allows you to play games
Hides the thumbnail previews in the search autocomplete list
Hides the expand button under videos in the search results
Hide surveys and nudges about feed recommendation accuracy
Hides \'People also watched\' and \'You might also like\' labels in search results
Hides \'Result from the web\' section from search results
Hides seasonal and event-based animations on the YouTube logo
Showing YouTube Doodles may prevent custom headers from displaying.
Hides informational context panels, such as medical information
Hides the chat replay button in the fullscreen mode
Hides the feature that allows users to react with emojis in the comments section and live chat
Hides the video title in the fullscreen mode
Choose which components appear in the video description
Hides Featured places, Games, Music, and People mentioned sections
Hides the Explore this course and Explore the podcast sections
Hide \'How this content was made\' section
Choose where to hide the scrolling category chips
Choose which components appear on channel page
Enter the channel tab names to filter by, separated by new lines
Hides the clickable web links in the channel header
Hides the list of channel members
Choose which components appear in the comments section

"• Be sure to enter the exact name of the carousel item (e.g. Ask, Hype this video, Listen on YouTube Music, etc.) • Hiding carousel items may have unintended side effects • If all carousel items are hidden, the entire comments section will also be hidden"
Enter the comments carousel names to filter by, separated by new lines
Hides contextual information messages in the comments section
Hide comments section in Home feed
Hides the comment preview under video before opening the full comments section
Hides all comment sorting options except \'Top\' and \'Newest\'
Configure custom filters to hide any component
List of component path builder strings to filter, separated by new lines
"Limitations: • Shorts shelves, channel pages, and search results may still show view counts • This feature does not work with automotive layout"
"Limitations: • Shorts shelves, channel pages, and search results may still show upload times • This feature does not work with automotive layout"
Choose specific words or phrases to hide videos in feeds and search

"Enter keywords and phrases to hide, separated by new lines
Keywords can be any text shown in video titles or channel names
Words with uppercase letters in the middle must match exactly (ie: iPhone, TikTok, LeBlanc)"

"Home / Subscriptions / Search results are filtered to hide content that matches keyword phrases
Limitations: • Shorts cannot be hidden by channel name • Some UI components may not be hidden • Searching for a keyword may show no results"

Surrounding a keyword/phrase with double-quotes will prevent partial matches of video titles and channel names

For example,
\"ai\" will hide the video: How does AI work?
but will not hide: What does fair use mean?
Keyword is too short and requires quotes: %s
Link with timestamp copied to clipboard
Tap to copy the video link, tap and hold to copy with timestamp
Reverses the tap and tap-and-hold actions of \'Copy video link\' button
This does not bypass the age restriction. It just accepts it automatically
Disables the two-finger double-tap gesture that skips chapters, which may be accidentally triggered with one finger
Download videos with third-party downloading apps
Shows an overlay button in video player that opens your external downloader
Replaces YouTube\'s built-in download function with your external downloader
Package name of your installed external downloader app
%s is not installed. Please install it.

"Could not find installed app with package name: %s
Verify the package name is correct and the app is installed"
The package name cannot be empty
Prevent loop video current state from being saved for subsequent videos

"Tap to generate a playlist of all videos from channel, tap and hold to undo
Info: May not work on live streams"
Unable to generate playlist due to channel ID mismatch
Video ID is unavailable. Please manually reload the video
Show Save to watch later button
Tap to save to watch later, tap and hold for queue options
Video successfully saved in watch later playlist
This video is already saved in watch later playlist
Cannot save this video in watch later playlist
Queue is kept after restarting the app
Tap for queue options, tap and hold to save to watch later
Prevents the live stream from opening when tapping the channel\'s avatar
Disables the precise seeking mode that activates when pulling up the seekbar

"Allows seeking on all livestreams, even those that normally restrict it
Note: If \'Spoof video streams\' is not enabled, enabling this may cause unexpected livestream seeking behavior"

"Allows you to rewind live broadcasts up to 7 days into the past
Note: If \'Spoof video streams\' is not enabled, enabling this may cause unexpected livestream seeking behavior"
Enables slide to seek instead of playing at 2x speed when pressing and holding the video player
Just tap the seekbar to jump to that position without dragging it
Swipe vertically on the left side of the fullscreen mode to adjust brightness
Swipe vertically on the right side of the fullscreen mode to adjust volume
Percentage of each screen edge reserved for brightness and volume gestures (5-50)
Requires pressing and holding before a swipe gesture is recognised
Remembers brightness level when entering / exiting fullscreen mode
Swiping brightness to its lowest value activates the system auto-brightness
The amount of milliseconds the overlay is visible
Adjust the transparency level (0 is transparent, 100 is opaque)
Set the color of the brightness controls progress bar
Set the color of the volume controls progress bar
Set the color of the playback speed controls progress bar
Adjust the size of the on-screen text (1-30)
The text size must be between 1-30
Set the required swipe distance before an adjustment triggers
Higher values increase the volume change per swipe
Higher values require more swiping per brightness step
Swipe horizontally in the upper zone of the fullscreen mode to change playback speed
Higher values require more swiping per speed step
Height of the speed gesture zone as a percentage of the player height (5-75)
Swipe in fullscreen mode to skip to the next or previous video
Choose which action buttons appear in portrait and fullscreen modes
Prevents the Like and Subscribe buttons from glowing when a creator mentions them
This may not work for some user accounts
Set the top margin of the quick actions bar (0-32 dp)
Manage automatic captions and caption cookies

"Fixes a stock YouTube's bug where the auto-translate captions may not be available due to missing cookies
\'Caption cookies\' must be provided"
Cookies to be set in Timed Text API (Caption Data API) requests
Resolves a precondition check failure that can prevent the transcript from loading
Choose which buttons appear in the bottom navigation bar
Opens Morphe settings when enabled, or YouTube settings when disabled
Swap Create button with Notifications button
If changing this setting does not take effect, try switching to Incognito mode

"This completely hides the navigation bar, including the 'You' tab.
To access Settings, enable the Settings button via General → Toolbar → Show Settings."
Reduces the horizontal spacing between buttons
Animates transitions when switching between tabs
Keeps the navigation bar visible while scrolling
Makes the status bar fully opaque
"Limitations: • A black bar may appear at the top of the video player. • The system navigation bar can change to transparent, and it's not possible to comment on videos."
Makes the navigation bar fully opaque in light mode
Makes the navigation bar fully opaque in dark mode
Choose which components appear in the toolbar
When enabled, tap opens Morphe settings and long press opens YouTube settings, disable to swap
Choose which components appear in the flyout menu

"\'Audio Track\' menu is hidden
To show the \'Audio Track\' menu, change \'Spoof video streams\' to \'Android Reel\' or \'TV\'"
Hides the upcoming video preview in fullscreen before autoplay begins
Choose which buttons appear over the video player
Hides the dark shading surrounding the video player controls
Manage Ambient mode visibility and power restrictions
Allows Ambient mode to stay active in battery saver mode
Stops the counting animation on like counts and view counts
Hides the watch progress bar shown on thumbnails of videos you have already watched
Choose which components appear in the Shorts player
Hide in Home feed & related videos

"Hides the suggested video overlay that appears after the video ends
This setting only works if autoplay is turned off. You can change it in YouTube: Settings → Playback (or Autoplay) → Autoplay next video"
Hides \'More videos\' overlay shown when swiping up in the fullscreen mode
Disables playlist and live chat panels from opening automatically
Exit fullscreen mode on video end
Adjust the transparency level (0 is transparent, 100 is opaque)
Player overlay opacity must be between 0-100
Dislikes are temporarily not available (API timed out)
Dislikes are not available (client API limit)
Reload video to vote using Return YouTube Dislike
Limitation: Dislikes may not appear in Incognito mode
Shows dislikes as a percentage of likes instead of a number
Reduces the width of the Like button to save space
Shows an estimated like count on videos where the creator has disabled likes
Shows a notification when the Return YouTube Dislike server is unavailable
Data is provided by the Return YouTube Dislike API. Tap here to learn more
Return YouTube Dislike API statistics of this device
Dislikes are temporarily not available - Client API rate limit in effect
API fetch votes, number of calls
API fetch votes, number of timeouts
SponsorBlock is a crowdsourced system for skipping annoying parts of YouTube videos
Adds a button to upvote or downvote segments
Uses rounded corners for SponsorBlock buttons and controls
Reduces the width of the Skip button to save space
Hides the Skip button after a few seconds instead of keeping it visible for the entire segment
Set how long the Skip buttons remains visible
Shows a notification allowing you to tap to undo an automatic skip
Set how long the undo notification remains visible
Subtracts all segments in total video duration shown on the seekbar
Adds a button to the video player allowing you to submit new SponsorBlock segments
Seek amount of the time adjustment buttons (in milliseconds)
Value must be a positive number
Guidelines contain rules and tips for creating new segments
Read the SponsorBlock guidelines before creating new segments
Shows a notification when the SponsorBlock server is unavailable
Sends skip counts to the SponsorBlock leaderboard to track how much time is saved
Segments shorter than this value (in seconds) will not be shown or skipped
This should be kept private. This is like a password and should not be shared with anyone. If someone has this, they can impersonate you
Private user ID must be at least 30 characters long
The address SponsorBlock uses to make calls to the server
SponsorBlock is disabled for whitelisted channels
Shows a notification when SponsorBlock is disabled for a whitelisted channel
Your SponsorBlock JSON configuration that can be imported / exported to Morphe and other SponsorBlock platforms

"Your SponsorBlock JSON configuration that can be imported / exported to Morphe and other SponsorBlock platforms
This includes your private user ID. Be sure to share this wisely"

"Your settings contain a private SponsorBlock user ID.
Your user ID is like a password, and it should never be shared."
Paid promotion, paid referrals and direct advertisements. Not for self-promotion or free shout-outs to causes / creators / websites / products they like
Similar to Sponsor except for unpaid / self promotion. Includes sections about merchandise, donations, or information about who they collaborated with
A short reminder to like, subscribe or follow them in the middle of content. If it is long or about something specific, it should instead be under self promotion
The part of the video that most people are looking for
An interval without actual content. Could be a pause, static frame, or repeating animation. Does not include transitions containing information
Credits or when the YouTube endcards appear. Not for conclusions with information
Narrated trailers for the upcoming video, greetings and goodbyes. Does not include sections that add additional content
Collection of clips that show what is coming up or what happened in the video or in other videos of a series, where all information is repeated elsewhere
Tangential scenes or jokes that are not required to understand the main content of the video. Does not include sections providing context or background details
Only for use in music videos. Sections of music videos without music that are not already covered by another category
Unable to submit segment. Rate Limited (too many from the same user or IP)
SponsorBlock is temporarily not available (API timed out)
Unable to vote for segment (API timed out)
There are no segments to vote for
Category is disabled in settings. Enable category to submit.
Set %s as the start or end of a new segment?

"The segment is from
%1$s to %2$s
(%3$s)
Ready to submit?"
Start must be before the end
First mark a location on the time bar
Preview the segment, and ensure it skips smoothly
Do you want to edit the timing for the start or end of the segment?

"Is the highlight time correct?
%s
If you\'re not submitting a highlight, tap Cancel and mark the second location"
Stats are temporarily not available (API is down)
Tap here to change your username
Tap here to view your segments
Tap here to see the global stats and top contributors

That\'s %s of their lives.
Tap here to see the leaderboard
Data is provided by the SponsorBlock API. Tap here to learn more and see downloads for other platforms

"Changes include:
Tablet layout • Community posts are hidden • Playback in feeds setting is not available • Remix button and Sound button are not available in Shorts • Video action bar is not collapsed
Automotive layout • Feed is organized by topics and channels • Playback in feeds setting is not available • Remix button and Sound button are not available in Shorts • Shorts open in the regular player • Video action bar is not collapsed"
Tricks the server into thinking you are using an older app version to restore legacy UI features

"App version will be spoofed to an older version of YouTube.
This will change the appearance and features of the app, but unknown side effects may occur.
If later turned off, it is recommended to clear the app data to prevent UI bugs."
20.13.41 - Restore channel name below video player
Opens the system share sheet instead of the in-app one when sharing content
Opens your preferred music app instead of YouTube Music when tapping music buttons
Package name of your installed target music app

"Always redirects to the chosen start page, not just on app startup
Limitation: Using the back button on the toolbar may not work"
Advances to the next Short automatically instead of repeating the current one
Advances to the next Short automatically during background playback
Disables the \'Continue watching\' miniplayer, a YouTube Premium feature that appears on app startup
Customize the appearance and behavior of the minimized video player
Prevents dragging the minimized player to different corners of the screen
Prevents closing the miniplayer by swiping it horizontally off-screen
Set the starting on-screen size, in pixels
Pixel size must be between %1$s and %2$s
Adjust the transparency level (0 is transparent, 100 is opaque)
Miniplayer overlay opacity must be between 0-100
Shows a gradient background on the loading screen instead of a solid color
Set the primary color of the video progress bar
Set the secondary color of the video progress bar
Redirects thumbnail requests to an alternative server to fix missing images in restricted countries

"DeArrow provides crowdsourced thumbnails for YouTube videos. These thumbnails are often more relevant than those provided by YouTube
If enabled, video URLs will be sent to the API server and no other data is sent. If a video does not have DeArrow thumbnails, then the original or still captures are shown
Tap here to learn more about DeArrow"
Shows a notification when the DeArrow server is unavailable
The URL of the DeArrow thumbnail cache endpoint
Still captures are taken from the beginning / middle / end of each video. These images are built into YouTube and no external API is used
Improves loading speeds by using medium-quality images. Live streams, unreleased and older videos may display blank thumbnails
DeArrow is temporarily not available (status code: %s)
Reverts the bold video player controls to the older, thinner visual style
Enabling this can unlock higher video qualities
Enabling this can cause video playback stuttering, worse battery life, and unknown side effects.
Choose which interactions trigger device vibration
Customize the playback controls shown on your lock screen and notification panel
Hides Previous and Next buttons in media notification, lock screen, and headphone controls
Prevents dragging the seekbar on the lock screen and notification panel
If you recently changed your account login details, then uninstall and reinstall MicroG.
Opens the original link directly, bypassing the tracking link (youtube.com/redirect)
Opens links in an external browser instead of the in-app browser
Applies your manual quality selection to all future videos
Shows a notification when a new default quality is saved
Default video quality on Wi-Fi network
Default video quality on mobile network
Applies your manual quality selection to all future Shorts
Default Shorts quality on Wi-Fi network
Default Shorts quality on mobile network
Tap and hold to reset speed to default
Tap and hold to reset quality to default
Enter your preferred playback speed option
Custom playback speeds must be less than %s
Set the speed multiplier when pressing and holding the screen, set to 0 to disable
Applies your manual speed selection to all future videos
Shows a notification when a new default playback speed is saved
Always play music videos at 1.0x speed

"Benefits: • Can improve battery life • Can restore missing video resolutions on older device
Limitations: • Maximum resolution is 1080p • Video playback will use more internet data than VP9 or AV1 • HDR videos will not use AVC • Some devices cannot force AVC"
To use this feature, set \'Spoof video streams\' to Android VR or Android Studio
Prioritizes the highest quality video over codec efficiency
Permits software AV1 decoding when using the Android VR client

"Enabling this setting may use software AV1 decoding.
Video playback with AV1 may stutter or drop frames."
• Experimental client and may stop working anytime
• Video may stop at 1:00, or may not be available in some regions
• 360° VR immersive mode is not available
• If deobfuscation fails, playback may fail
• Force original audio is not available
Show spoofing in Stats for nerds
